name: New Broker Onboarding
description: Nurture new brokers from first listing through activation

steps.name: Welcome Email
steps.subject: Claim Your Listing - Fast Approval Available
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I noticed your listing and wanted to reach out personally.

We specialize in fast approvals and competitive rates.

Best regards,
The LoanBud Team

steps.name: Day 3 Call Reminder
steps.note: Follow up on welcome email sent Day 0. Ask if they reviewed our offer and have questions.

steps.name: Day 7 SMS Check-in
steps.message: Hi {{first_name}}, just checking in on your listing application. Reply anytime — we're here to help!

steps.name: Day 14 Follow-up Email
steps.subject: Still here to help — next steps for your listing
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

It's been two weeks since we first connected. I wanted to make sure you have everything you need to move forward.

Reply to this email or give us a call — we'd love to help you get funded.

Best,
John

name: Re-engagement Flow
description: Win back inactive partners with a structured touchpoint series

steps.name: Re-engagement Email
steps.subject: We miss you — let's reconnect
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

We haven't heard from you in a while and wanted to reconnect.

We have some exciting new programs that might be a great fit for you.

Best,
LoanBud Team

steps.name: Day 5 Call Reminder
steps.note: Check if they opened the re-engagement email. Offer a quick intro call.

steps.name: Day 10 SMS
steps.message: Hi {{first_name}}, we have new loan programs with competitive rates. Interested? Reply YES and we'll be in touch.

name: Lender Partner Nurture
description: Keep lender partners engaged with periodic updates and check-ins

steps.name: Intro Email
steps.subject: Welcome to the LoanBud Partner Network
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for joining our partner network. We're excited to work with you.

As a partner you'll receive priority support and early access to new programs.

Let's connect soon.

Mike

steps.name: Day 7 Call Reminder
steps.note: Intro call to discuss partnership terms and first referral opportunity.

steps.name: Day 21 Update Email
steps.subject: Your first month as a LoanBud partner — here's what's new
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

It's been three weeks since you joined and we wanted to share some highlights.

New programs, updated rates, and exclusive referral bonuses are live. Check the portal for details.

Mike

name: Working Capital Fast-Track
description: Accelerated outreach for high-intent working capital brokers

steps.name: Fast-Track Intro Email
steps.subject: Your working capital options — let's move fast
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Based on your recent activity, you're a great fit for our working capital program.

We can move quickly — reply and I'll get you pre-qualified this week.

Best,
John

steps.name: Day 2 SMS Nudge
steps.message: Hi {{first_name}}, following up on the working capital email — want me to send over the quick application link?

steps.name: Day 5 Rate Recap Email
steps.subject: Locked-in rates for your working capital request
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Here's a recap of the rates we discussed. These are available for a limited window.

Let's get your application in before they change.

John

name: SBA Loan Nurture
description: Long-cycle nurture for SBA 7(a) prospects with a voicemail touchpoint

steps.name: SBA Program Overview Email
steps.subject: Is an SBA 7(a) loan right for your business?
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

SBA 7(a) loans offer some of the best terms available for growing businesses.

I've attached a quick overview. Let me know if you'd like to explore your eligibility.

Sarah

steps.name: Day 4 Voicemail Drop
steps.note: Drop the SBA intro voicemail. Mention the overview email and invite them to book an eligibility call.

steps.name: Day 10 Eligibility Email
steps.subject: Your SBA eligibility checklist — 5 minutes to review
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Here's a short checklist to see if you pre-qualify for an SBA 7(a) loan.

Reply with any questions and we'll walk through it together.

Sarah

name: Quarterly Broker Check-in
description: Lightweight quarterly touchpoint to keep active brokers engaged

steps.name: Quarterly Update Email
steps.subject: Q2 rates and programs — your quarterly LoanBud update
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Here's what's new this quarter — updated rates, two new programs, and faster turnaround times.

As always, reach out anytime.

John

steps.name: Day 5 SMS Touch
steps.message: Hi {{first_name}}, quick quarterly check-in from LoanBud — anything we can help fund this quarter?
